summary: Created tests/healthCheck.test.ts with 15 tests across 4 describe blocks covering all acceptance criteria: production build succeeds (3 tests), no console errors on normal load (2 tests), scene renders when audio is blocked (3 tests), and mute toggle + info overlay both work (7 tests). Added HTMLAudioElement.prototype.play stubs where needed to handle jsdom's missing implementation. All 253 tests pass.
